'''Sev''' was the name taken by<ref name="RC:HC" /> a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. He was created by the [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] cloners on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] for use in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="db" /> Trained as a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone]] [[Clone commando/Legends|commando]], he was made a member of [[Niner's squad]], serving alongside fellow commandos [[DD]] and [[O-Four]] under [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Niner Skirata|Niner]]. The squad was deployed to the planet [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|first battle]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. During the fight Sev, O-Four and DD were all killed, leaving Niner as the only member of his original squad. The sergeant later wished he had held Sev and DD back during the battle. Sev was able to tell what others around him were doing without looking,<ref name="RC:HC" /> and like all clone troopers, he was 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall.<ref name="db" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sev was first mentioned in ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' a [[2004]] novel written by [[Karen Traviss]]. He later received mention in ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' and ''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'', other books in the same [[Republic Commando|series]].
